core.label: GraphQL Fundamentals
core.description: Schema, queries, mutations, and the type system.

topics.label: What is GraphQL
topics.description: A query language for APIs. Clients request exactly the data they need.

topics.label: Schema & Types
topics.description: Define types with SDL — Object, Scalar, Enum, Interface, Union, Input.

topics.label: Queries
topics.description: Read data with queries. Nested fields, arguments, and aliases.

topics.label: Mutations
topics.description: Write data with mutations. Input types for complex arguments.

topics.label: Variables & Fragments
topics.description: Parameterize queries with variables and reuse fields with fragments.

topics.label: Resolvers
topics.description: Server-side functions that fetch data for each field.

topics.label: Subscriptions
topics.description: Real-time data with GraphQL subscriptions over WebSocket.

topics.label: Introspection
topics.description: Query the schema itself. Powers GraphQL tools and documentation.
